allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -Path F:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\sbox\\bin\\managed\\Mono.Cecil.dll; $asm = [Mono.Cecil.AssemblyDefinition]::ReadAssembly\("F:\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\common\\sbox\\bin\\managed\\Sandbox.Engine.dll"\); foreach \($t in $asm.MainModule.GetTypes\(\)\) { foreach \($m in $t.Methods\) { if \($m.Name -eq '<InitSystems>b__168_0'\) { Write-Output \("=== filter on " + $t.FullName + " ==="\); foreach \($i in $m.Body.Instructions\) { Write-Output \($i.OpCode.ToString\(\) + "  " + $i.Operand\) } } } })
